title: excoecaria marginata var. lanceolata
intro: Excoecaria marginata var. lanceolata, also known as the lanceolate yellow oleander, is a plant species within the family Euphorbiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The lanceolate yellow oleander is believed to offer various health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves or other parts may be used to create infusions or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although it is essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedies.
